message:
🌱 Add kyverno: [Feature] JSON Logging mission (#1055)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kyverno-3411-feature-json-logging",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kyverno: [Feature] JSON Logging",
+    "description": "[Feature] JSON Logging. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kyverno deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kyverno version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nhelm list -n kyverno 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kyverno installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kyverno configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kyverno configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl get configmap -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kyverno\n```\n### Problem Statement\n\nI'd like Kyverno to be able to log in JSON. This allows log aggregation pipelines to be naive to the format of incoming logs.\n\n### Solution Description\n\nA CLI argument that makes Kyverno log in JSON instead of klog."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature] JSON Logging",
+        "description": "*: If this PR results in new or altered behavior which is user facing, you\n\nread and follow the steps outlined in the [PR documentation guide](pr_documentation.md) and add Proof Manifests as defined below.\n-->\n\n### Proof Manifests\n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: roles-dictionary\n  namespace: default\ndata:\n  allowed-roles: \"[\\\"cluster-admin\\\", \\\"cluster-operator\\\", \\\"tenant-admin\\\"]\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl get events -n kyverno --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Feature] JSON Logging\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "*: If this PR results in new or altered behavior which is user facing, you\n\nread and follow the steps outlined in the [PR documentation guide](pr_documentation.md) and add Proof Manifests as defined below.\n-->\n\n### Proof Manifests",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: roles-dictionary\n  namespace: default\ndata:\n  allowed-roles: \"[\\\"cluster-admin\\\", \\\"cluster-operator\\\", \\\"tenant-admin\\\"]\"",
+        "name: prepend-image-registry\npolicies:\n  - prepend_image_registry.yaml\nresources:\n  - resource.yaml\nvariables: values.yaml\nresults:\n  - policy: prepend-registry\n    rule: prepend-registry-containers\n    resource: mypod\n    # if mutate rule\n    patchedResource: patchedResource01.yaml\n    kind: Pod\n    result: pass"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kyverno",
+      "incubating",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kyverno"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/3411",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/pull/4661"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 13,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kyverno installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
